pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project will not compile or run correctly on JDK 21 if the source/target compatibility remains at 17, potentially causing class version mismatches or missing language features.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/model/UserE.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/model/UserE.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID is not a serial component and must be annotated with @Serial in Java 14+.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/model/UserE.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/model/UserE.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol class Serial.
